blocked_reason: The active concept/mechanism records now carry required population receipts, concept cluster_flags, mechanism population bindings, and planned target statuses. The current corpus writer does not yet derive those overlays from source rows, and this work item explicitly forbids doctrine_lattice.py edits.

spec: Teach concept corpus generation to source receipt_refs or declared record receipts without hand-overlay drift.
Teach concept markdown projection to expose cluster_flag as a compact route row without making it source authority.
Teach concept corpus generation to derive cluster_flag from concept relationships and source specimen rows.
Teach mechanism corpus generation to derive mechanism_payload.population_binding from registry/source row evidence.
Teach mechanism edge target_status derivation to honor source planned_targets for unresolved organ targets.
Regenerate concept/mechanism markdown projections after the writer can reproduce JSON overlays.
Then rerun --check-concept-corpus and --check-mechanism-corpus as green corpus parity gates.

reentry_condition: After controller releases the doctrine_lattice.py corpus writer update, rerun concept/mechanism corpus writes, rerun parity checks, rerun the concept/mechanism validator, and refresh markdown projections through the owner builder, including concept cluster_flag projection.
